description: Model for computing AI future relevance (0-1) from skill structural_scores. All dimensions scored 0-5; higher = more beneficial. Result is combined then clamped to 0-1. Every skill in skills.json must have full structural_scores (all six dimensions numeric); there is no fallback. Missing or incomplete data is a bug and the code fails fast. See bft-doc/AI_SKILLS_DECISION_MATRIX.md.

dimensions.label: AI Resistance
dimensions.core_question: How resistant is this skill to being performed autonomously by AI at expert level within 10-15 years?

dimensions.label: Leverage Multiplier
dimensions.core_question: Does this skill increase your ability to use AI or coordinate others?
dimensions.why_it_matters: Some skills amplify all other skills.

dimensions.label: Authority Pathway
dimensions.core_question: Does mastering this skill position you to own decisions later?
dimensions.why_it_matters: Long-term security comes from decision ownership.

dimensions.label: Scarcity Durability
dimensions.core_question: Is this skill structurally scarce (legal, embodied, relational, physical)?

dimensions.label: Cross-Domain Transferability
dimensions.core_question: Can this skill apply across industries?

dimensions.label: Time-to-Compound
dimensions.core_question: Does early investment create exponential returns over 10+ years?
dimensions.why_it_matters: Some skills must start early to master deeply.
